title: Angela Lülle
text:
Hi, I’m Angela! I’m a PhD candidate in Economics at the University of Namur, where I work under the supervision of Catherine Guirkinger. I am a research fellow of the F.N.R.S. and affiliated with the Center of Research in Development Economics (CRED-DeFiPP).


`
